message:
🌱 Add crossplane: compositionRevisionRef needs to be consistent when managing mission (#1643)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "crossplane-2544-compositionrevisionref-needs-to-be-consistent-when-managing-mult",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "crossplane: compositionRevisionRef needs to be consistent when managing multiple clusters",
+    "description": "compositionRevisionRef needs to be consistent when managing multiple clusters. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current crossplane deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your crossplane version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nhelm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working crossplane installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review crossplane configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane\n```\n### What problem are you facing?\n\nAlthough this feature is not yet released (slated for 1.4), we have identified a necessary area of improvement for those who manage many kubernetes clusters."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for compositionRevisionRef needs to be consistent when managing…",
+        "description": "### Description of your changes\n\nIn this PR, we're implementing Composition Revision Selectors and changing revision creation/selection logics to utilize them.\n- While calculating the composition hash, we start to include composition labels and annotations. This means, we create a new revision each\n```yaml\nEvery 2.0s: kubectl get compositionrevisions -o=custom-columns=NAME:...  ezgis-mbp: Mon Nov 14 15:28:59 2022\n\nNAME                                              REVISION   LABEL\nezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   1          dev\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"compositionRevisionRef needs to be consistent when managing…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Description of your changes\n\nIn this PR, we're implementing Composition Revision Selectors and changing revision creation/selection logics to utilize them.\n- While calculating the composition hash, we start to include composition labels and annotations.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Every 2.0s: kubectl get compositionrevisions -o=custom-columns=NAME:...  ezgis-mbp: Mon Nov 14 15:28:59 2022\n\nNAME                                              REVISION   LABEL\nezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   1          dev",
+        "Every 2.0s: kubectl get claim -o=custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,...  ezgis-mbp: Mon Nov 14 15:29:30 2022\n\nNAME          SYNCED   REVISION                                          POLICY      MATCHLABEL\nvpc-auto      True     ezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   Automatic   <none>\nvpc-dev       True     ezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   Automatic   map[env:dev]\nvpc-dev-man   True     ezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   Manual      <none>\nvpc-staging   True     <none>                                            Automatic   map[env:staging]",
+        "Every 2.0s: kubectl get composite -o=custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.n...  ezgis-mbp: Mon Nov 14 15:29:48 2022\n\nNAME                REVISION                                          POLICY      ID\nvpc-auto-qfrdl      ezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   Automatic   vpc-auto\nvpc-dev-9dhvd       ezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   Automatic   vpc-dev\nvpc-dev-man-jvklt   ezginetworks.aws.platformref.upbound.io-1f491cf   Manual      vpc-dev-man\nvpc-staging-ww4fs   <none>                                            Automatic   vpc-staging"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "crossplane",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "crossplane"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/issues/2544",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3450"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with crossplane installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
